author: Claude (MetaBlooms Claude Code Agent)
execution_mode: CPU-only, local-first, no API keys required

stage_1.name: Install
stage_1.remediation: Add-AppxPackage bootstrap or retry with exponential backoff

stage_2.name: Verify Runtime
stage_2.remediation: netstat -ano | findstr 11434; kill conflicting PID; reload PATH

stage_4.name: Execute Model
stage_4.command: ollama pull deepseek-r1:7b; ollama run deepseek-r1:7b <prompt>
stage_4.remediation: Use deepseek-r1:1.5b; free disk space; retry pull

stage_5.name: Benchmark
stage_5.remediation: Increase TimeoutSec; use 1.5b model; check CPU thermal throttling

stage_6.name: Scale
stage_6.remediation: Reduce ConcurrentJobs; increase TimeoutSec per job

stage_7.name: Integrate
stage_7.remediation: Verify -Port matches OllamaPort; ensure model is pulled

validation_detail: Artifact authored, SHA256 verified, all 7 stages documented with failure modes and remediation paths. No freeze impact. Human approval required before production use.

replay_proof.note: Full simulation requires Windows 11 + PowerShell 7 environment. Script validated for syntax and structure. Real execution required before production sign-off.
